name: Chocolate Zucchini Bundt Cake
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, mix together the sugar, oil, eggs, vanilla extract, and shredded zucchini until well combined.
2. In another bowl, whisk together the flour, cocoa powder, baking powder, baking soda, salt, and cinnamon.
3. Alternately add the dry ingredients to the zucchini mixture with milk, mixing until just combined.
4. Grease a 10-inch Bundt pan with butter or cooking spray.
5. Shake any remaining crumbs into the greased pan.
6. Pour the batter into the prepared Bundt pan.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 350°F (175°C) for 50-60 minutes, or until a toothpick inserted into the center comes out clean.
8. Allow the cake to stand in the pan for 10 minutes before removing it to prevent it from falling apart.
